title: Applying the sine sum formula
text: Recall the sum identity for sine: $$sin\left(A+B\right)$$ $$=$$ sin A cos B + cos A sin B

title: Evaluate trigonometric values
text: Determine the exact values of $$cos\left(\frac{11\pi}{6}\right)$$ and $$sin\left(\frac{11\pi}{6}\right)$$.

title: Evaluate $$cos\left(\frac{11\pi}{6}\right)$$
text: What is the exact value of $$cos\left(\frac{11\pi}{6}\right)$$?

title: Evaluate $$sin\left(\frac{11\pi}{6}\right)$$
text: What is the exact value of $$sin\left(\frac{11\pi}{6}\right)$$?
